user_query: I'm a sports fan and I want to stay updated on the latest WNBA odds and matches. Can you fetch me the latest odds and matches available on Chillybets? Additionally, provide me with the game summary data for the most recent WNBA game.

TaskList.description: Fetch the latest WNBA odds and matches from Chillybets.
Retrieve the game summary data for the most recent WNBA game.
